mapper.select: SELECT question_id , survey_id , question_number , question_text , question_type_code , description , sort_order , reg_dt FROM tbl_survey_question WHERE question_id = #{questionId}

SELECT question_id , survey_id , question_number , question_text , question_type_code , description , sort_order , reg_dt FROM tbl_survey_question WHERE survey_id = #{surveyId} ORDER BY sort_order, question_number

SELECT a.question_id , a.survey_id , a.question_number , a.question_text , a.question_type_code , a.description , a.sort_order , a.reg_dt , c.selected_option_id , c.selected_value FROM tbl_survey_question a JOIN ( SELECT response_id , survey_id , user_id , ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY survey_id, user_id ORDER BY completed_at desc ) AS rn FROM tbl_user_survey_response ) b ON a.survey_id = b.survey_id AND b.rn = 1 LEFT JOIN tbl_survey_answer c ON b.response_id = c.response_id AND a.question_id = c.question_id WHERE a.survey_id = #{surveyId} AND b.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.sort_order, a.question_number
